hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command') && if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q '^git push'; then exit 0; fi && PR_NUMBER=$(gh pr view --json number --jq .number 2>/dev/null) || exit 0 && if [ -z "$PR_NUMBER" ]; then exit 0; fi && gh pr edit "$PR_NUMBER" --add-reviewer @copilot > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Copilot review requested on PR #$PR_NUMBER\"}}"
